entries.value: I'm glad we got to spend this last day together...
Me too... Tell me, were you truly happy... with me?
Of course, you fool. I was always happy with you. You know that.
We lived our life, fully. And we spared them from all this. It's better that way...
Yeah... I just wish we had a little more time... together...
Yes... We can already see him from here... He's massive...
Come here... Let me hold you one last time...
It... it hurts... so much... Why... why am I not dying...?
Please... someone... end this... I can’t... take it anymore...
